text: 🐻 If you are confused about what's actually been happening in the world - we got you! Here's the key news of the past 24 hours: ➡️ Of course, the ceasefire between Iran and the Epstein Coalition didn't last - Israel attacked Lebanon, Pakistani PM confirms that the ceasefire was violated, and here's what we think actually happened. ➡️ Iran was attacked as well ➡️ The Belgian Foreign Minister who came to Lebanon to negotiate a ceasefire in the region says that Israel almost killed him , and Italy has summoned the Israeli ambassador after IDF forces fired on an Italian UNIFIL convoy in southern Lebanon. ➡️ Dmitry Medvedev gives a summary of the sitation around Iran ➡️ Trump says that any country that supplies Iran with weapons will be hit with 50% tariffs , and is upset with NATO ➡️ Iranian FM Araghchi says that the U.S. must choose — ceasefire or continued war via Israel. ➡️ Leavitt says the 10-point plan reported by media is not the one Trump agreed to use as a basis for negotiations , and Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesperson Esmaeil Baghaei accused the United States of backtracking on the terms of a reported Iran–US ceasefire understanding. ➡️ Russians are testing some sort of automated anti-drone machine gun turret, watch it do its thing ➡️ An investigative exposé on the "Christian Genocide" narrative and the weaponization of terrorism in Nigeria's Middle Belt. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🐻 如果你对世界正在发生的真实情况感到困惑——我们为你梳理！以下是过去24小时的关键新闻：➡️ 当然，伊朗与爱泼斯坦联盟的停火未能持久——以色列袭击了黎巴嫩，巴基斯坦总理证实停火遭破坏，以下是我们认为实际发生的情况。➡️ 伊朗也遭到攻击 ➡️ 赴黎巴嫩谈判地区停火的比利时外交部长称以色列差点杀了他，而在以色列国防军向黎巴嫩南部的意大利联黎部队车队开火后，意大利已召见以色列大使。➡️ 德米特里·梅德韦杰夫就伊朗周边局势进行总结 ➡️ 特朗普表示任何向伊朗提供武器的国家将面临50%关税，并对北约感到不满 ➡️ 伊朗外长阿拉格希称美国必须选择——停火或通过以色列继续战争。➡️ 莱维特表示媒体报道的10点计划并非特朗普同意作为谈判基础的那份，伊朗外交部发言人埃斯梅尔·巴盖则指责美国在已报道的伊美停火谅解条款上出尔反尔。➡️ 俄罗斯人正在测试某种自动反无人机机枪塔，观看其运作过程 ➡️ 关于尼日利亚中部地带“基督教种族灭绝”叙事及恐怖主义武器化的调查性曝光。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 NATO Secretary General Rutte says that U.S. President Trump is clearly upset by the lack of NATO support during the conflict with Iran, but that he explained to Trump the ways that NATO members gave support. "Well, let me be absolutely clear. He is clearly disappointed with many NATO allies, and I can see his point. But at the same time, I was also able to point to the fact that the large majority of European nations has been helpful with basing, with logistics, with overflights, with making sure that they live up to the commitments. And there is also widespread support for the fact that degrading the nuclear and the ballistic missile capacity from Iran was really crucial and that only the U.S. was able to do that at this point." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 北约秘书长吕特表示，美国总统特朗普显然对北约在伊朗冲突期间缺乏支持感到不满，但他已向特朗普解释北约成员国提供支持的方式。“好吧，让我说得非常清楚。他对许多北约盟国显然感到失望，我能理解他的观点。但与此同时，我也能指出，绝大多数欧洲国家在基地使用、后勤支援、领空飞越及履行承诺方面提供了帮助。而且各方广泛认同削弱伊朗核与弹道导弹能力至关重要，而目前只有美国能够做到这一点。” @wfwitness

text: Tucker Carlson: "The United States has to detach from Israel." "This distancing should begin with a total end of aid of any kind—military or economic—to Israel."
text_zh: 塔克·卡尔森：“美国必须与以色列脱钩。”“这种疏远应始于完全停止对以色列的任何援助——无论是军事还是经济。”

text: Tucker Carlson: "Why can't this president, or any president, say no to Israel?" "Why does this tiny country have so much control over our government?"
text_zh: 塔克·卡尔森：“为什么这位总统，或任何总统，都不能对以色列说不？”“为什么这个小国对我们的政府有如此大的控制力？”

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 AP: 50 newly created Polymarket wallets placed large “Yes” bets on a ceasefire on April 7, despite escalating rhetoric from U.S. President Trump earlier in the day suggesting no imminent agreement. Some accounts made significant profits within hours. One wallet reportedly turned a $72,000 position into around $200,000, while others recorded gains exceeding $100,000. The episode has renewed calls in Washington to regulate prediction markets more tightly, amid concerns they could be exploited by insiders with advance knowledge of geopolitical or military developments. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美联社：尽管美国总统特朗普当天早些时候的升级言论暗示不会立即达成协议，但50个新创建的Polymarket钱包仍在4月7日对停火投下大量“是”的赌注。部分账户在数小时内获得巨额利润。据报道，一个钱包将7.2万美元的头寸变为约20万美元，其他账户则录得超过10万美元的收益。此事引发华盛顿新一轮呼吁，要求更严格监管预测市场，因担忧其可能被掌握地缘政治或军事进展内幕消息者利用。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ: The White House is considering a plan to punish certain NATO allies that U.S. President Trump believes did not support the United States and Israel during the Iran war. The proposal includes potentially relocating U.S. troops away from countries deemed unhelpful, such as Spain, Germany, Italy, and France, and redeploying them to more supportive nations, particularly in Eastern Europe. The plan remains in early stages but has gained traction among senior officials. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 华尔街日报：白宫正考虑一项计划，旨在惩罚美国总统特朗普认为在伊朗战争期间未支持美国和以色列的某些北约盟国。该提案包括可能将美军从被视为未提供帮助的国家（如西班牙、德国、意大利和法国）撤离，并重新部署到更支持美国的国家，尤其是东欧地区。该计划仍处于早期阶段，但已获得高级官员的关注。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 Kan: Israeli officials assess that Iran is considering launching attacks against Israel in response to continued Israeli strikes in Lebanon after the Israeli leadership insisted to the U.S. that Lebanon not be included in the ceasefire agreement. Despite the current truce, Israeli officials believe the ceasefire could become permanent and lead to a broader agreement with Iran, though concerns remain over Tehran’s ballistic missile programme and enriched uranium stockpiles. Sources in Israel expressed frustration over the situation, suggesting the current arrangement may only delay future conflict, while acknowledging the decisive role of the United States in shaping outcomes. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 坎：以色列官员评估，伊朗正考虑对以色列发动袭击，以回应以色列在黎巴嫩的持续打击，此前以色列领导层向美国坚持黎巴嫩不应被纳入停火协议。尽管当前停火，以色列官员认为停火可能成为永久性，并导致与伊朗达成更广泛协议，但仍对德黑兰的弹道导弹计划和浓缩铀库存表示担忧。以色列消息人士对局势表示沮丧，暗示当前安排可能仅推迟未来冲突，同时承认美国在塑造结果中的决定性作用。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇹🇭🇮🇷Khaosod: The Thai flagged vessel Mayuree Naree has run aground on the Iranian island of Qeshm. Previously the vessel was struck by an unidentified munition with the fate of three crew members still unknown. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇹🇭 🇮🇷 Thai Foreign Minister Sihasak Phuangketkeow announced that the three missing Thai crew members of the Mayuree Naree have been confirmed dead. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复WarFront Witness："⚡️🇹🇭🇮🇷考索德：泰国籍船只Mayuree Naree已在伊朗格什姆岛搁浅。此前该船遭不明弹药击中，三名船员命运仍未知。@wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇹🇭 🇮🇷 泰国外交部长西哈萨·蓬吉特克奥宣布，Mayuree Naree号三名失踪泰国船员已确认死亡。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Newsmax: Two U.S. officials said that the U.S. has not launched strikes against Iran since the start of the ceasefire. "We have not conducted strikes against Iran since the ceasefire agreement started. If anyone is striking Iran now, it isn't our military." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Newsmax：两名美国官员表示，自停火开始以来，美国未对伊朗发动打击。"自停火协议生效以来，我们未对伊朗进行打击。如果现在有人打击伊朗，那不是我们的军队。"@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇫🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 AFP: French President Macron told U.S. President Trump that the ceasefire with Iran must include Lebanon. @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 🇯🇵 Russia has summoned Japan’s Ambassador Akira Muto over reports that Tokyo-based Terra Drone signed a deal with a Ukrainian developer of combat drones. Moscow called the move hostile and says Japan’s current policy under Sanae Takaichi has pushed bilateral relations to an all-time low. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 🇯🇵 俄罗斯已召见日本驻俄大使武藤显，因有报道称总部位于东京的Terra Drone公司与一家乌克兰战斗无人机开发商签署了协议。莫斯科称此举具有敌意，并表示高市早苗领导下的日本现行政策已将双边关系推向历史最低点。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 Hezbollah has launched rockets to Northern Israel. There are impacts in the area. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Citing an Israeli violation of a recent ceasefire agreement, Hezbollah claimed responsibility for the rocket strike in Al-Manara, Israel. "In the name of God, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful [Permission to fight has been given to those who are being fought, because they were wronged. And indeed, Allah is competent to give them victory.] God Almighty has spoken the truth. In defense of Lebanon and its people: In response to the enemy's violation of the ceasefire agreement, and after the Resistance committed to the ceasefire while the enemy did not adhere to it, the fighters of the Islamic Resistance targeted the Al-Manara settlement at 02:30 on Thursday, 09-04-2026, with a rocket salvo. This response will continue until the Israeli-American aggression against our country and our people stops. And victory is not but from Allah, the Exalted in Might, the Wise. Thursday, April 9, 2026 AD 20 Shawwal 1447 AH" @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 真主党向以色列北部发射火箭弹。该地区有爆炸发生。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 真主党以以色列违反近期停火协议为由，声称对以色列Al-Manara的火箭弹袭击负责。“奉至仁至慈的真主之名[被进攻者，已获得反抗的许可，因为他们是受压迫的。真主对于援助他们，确是全能的。] 真主至大所言属实。为保卫黎巴嫩及其人民：针对敌人违反停火协议的行为，且在抵抗组织遵守停火而敌人未守约之后，伊斯兰抵抗组织的战士于2026年4月9日星期四02:30，向Al-Manara定居点发射了火箭弹齐射。只要以色列-美国对我国及人民的侵略不停止，此类反击将持续。胜利只来自万能且睿智的真主。公元2026年4月9日星期四 回历1447年10月20日” @wfwitness

text: 🌟 Hezbollah: Attacks will continue until aggression stops In defense of Lebanon and its people, and in response to the enemy’s violation of the ceasefire—after the resistance upheld it while the enemy did not—Islamic Resistance fighters launched a missile strike on Mastouneh Al-Manara at 02:30 on Thursday, 09-04-2026. These retaliatory strikes will continue until Israeli-American aggression against our country and people ceases.
text_zh: 🌟 真主党：袭击将持续至侵略停止 为保卫黎巴嫩及其人民，并回应敌人违反停火协议——在抵抗组织遵守停火而敌人未守约之后——伊斯兰抵抗组织的战士于2026年4月9日星期四02:30向Mastouneh Al-Manara发动了导弹袭击。只要以色列-美国对我国及人民的侵略不停止，此类报复性打击将继续。

text: No oil tankers have passed through the Strait of Hormuz since yesterday's ceasefire, and the four ships that have passed are all dry cargo carriers, data from shipping intelligence firm Kpler shows — NYT
text_zh: 航运情报公司Kpler数据显示，自昨日停火以来，无油轮通过霍尔木兹海峡，已通过的四艘船均为干货船——纽约时报

text: ⚡️ 🇰🇷 🇺🇸 South Korea and the United States announce the start of their joint “Freedom Flag” air drills this week, running from April 10-24 from Gwangju air base. South Korea will deploy F-15K, KF-16, F-35A, KA-1 light attack aircraft, and KC-330 transport planes, while the U.S. will use F-16s, F/A-18s, RQ-4 Global Hawk, and MQ-9 Reaper drones. The exercises will focus on air defense, interdiction, and close air support. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇰🇷 🇰🇷 韩国与美国宣布本周启动“自由旗帜”联合空中演习，4月10日至24日期间在光州空军基地举行。韩国将出动F-15K、KF-16、F-35A、KA-1轻型攻击机和KC-330运输机，美军则使用F-16、F/A-18、RQ-4全球鹰和MQ-9死神无人机。演习将聚焦防空、拦截与近距空中支援。@wfwitness

text: ❗️ Hezbullah confirms they are part of the ceasefire and stress that the limited rocket fire tonight is the start of a response ladder until Israel and the U.S comply Hezbullah: In defense of Lebanon and its people, in response to the enemy's violation of the ceasefire agreement, and after the resistance adhered to the ceasefire while the enemy did not, the Islamic Resistance fighters targeted the "Manara" settlement at 02:30 on Thursday, 09/04/2026, with a rocket barrage. This response will continue until the "israeli"-American aggression against our country and our people ceases. "
text_zh: ❗️ 真主党确认参与停火，并强调今夜有限火箭弹袭击是回应阶梯的开端，直至以色列与美国遵守协议。真主党声明：为保卫黎巴嫩及其人民，回应敌人违反停火协议的行为，在抵抗力量遵守停火而敌人未守约后，伊斯兰抵抗战士于2026年4月9日周四02:30以火箭弹齐射袭击“马纳拉”定居点。此回应将持续至‘以色列’-美国对我国及人民的侵略停止为止。

text: ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 WaPo: Hungary privately offered assistance to Iran following a major Israeli operation targeting Hezbollah, raising concerns among Western officials about Budapest’s geopolitical positioning. Hungarian Foreign Minister Szijjártó told Iranian Foreign Minister Araghchi that Hungary’s intelligence services would share information related to the incident, despite Hungary publicly maintaining a pro-Israel stance. The report has intensified scrutiny of Hungary’s role within NATO and the EU, particularly as it navigates relationships with competing global powers during a period of heightened Middle East tensions. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 《华盛顿邮报》：匈牙利在以色列针对真主党发动大规模行动后，私下向伊朗提供援助，引发西方官员对布达佩斯地缘政治立场的担忧。匈牙利外长西雅尔多告知伊朗外长阿拉格齐，尽管匈牙利公开维持亲以色列立场，其情报部门将分享与该事件相关的信息。此报道加剧了对匈牙利在北约和欧盟中角色的审视，尤其是在中东紧张局势升级期间，其周旋于竞争性全球大国关系之际。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Strait of Hormuz sees almost no tanker movement since the ceasefire, according to NYT. Only four vessels crossed the strait — all dry cargo ships.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 据《纽约时报》报道，自停火以来，霍尔木兹海峡几乎未见油轮活动。仅有四艘船只穿越海峡——均为干货船。

text: 🇱🇧 Tomorrow, we’re hosting a special Lebanon-focused show, and we’re honored to be joined by our friend Ali Rida Sbeity — a Lebanese journalist and war correspondent for RT, as well as the cameraman for our friend Steve Sweeney. You may remember Ali and Steve from when they were targeted in a Zionist airstrike while reporting in southern Lebanon. ➡️ Make sure to
text_zh: 🇱🇧 明天，我们将举办一场聚焦黎巴嫩的特别节目，荣幸邀请到我们的朋友阿里·里达·斯贝提——一位黎巴嫩记者、RT战地通讯员，也是我们朋友史蒂夫·斯威尼的摄像师。您可能还记得阿里和史蒂夫在黎巴嫩南部报道时曾成为犹太复国主义空袭目标。➡️ 请务必

text: 🇮🇷 IRGC Navy announced alternative routes for transit in the Strait of Hormuz IRGC Navy: — Considering the wartime situation in the Persian Gulf and the Strait of Hormuz from 1404/12/09 to 1405/01/19 and the possibility of various types of anti-ship mines in the main traffic zone of the Strait of Hormuz (according to the map), it is announced to all ships intending to transit the Strait of Hormuz that, to observe maritime safety principles and avoid possible contact with naval mines, they must coordinate with the IRGC Navy in the Strait of Hormuz and, until further notice, use the following alternative routes for transit in the Strait of Hormuz as per the attached map: — Entry route: From the Sea of Oman northwards, to Larak Island, then continuing towards the Persian Gulf. (According to the map) — Exit route: From the Persian Gulf, passing south of Larak Island, and continuing towards the Sea of Oman. (According to the map)
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军宣布霍尔木兹海峡替代航线 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军：——鉴于波斯湾及霍尔木兹海峡自1404年12月9日至1405年1月19日处于战时状态，且霍尔木兹海峡主要通航区（据地图所示）可能存在各类反舰水雷，特此通告所有计划穿越霍尔木兹海峡的船只：为遵守海上安全原则并避免可能接触水雷，必须与霍尔木兹海峡的伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军协调，且在另行通知前，按附图使用以下霍尔木兹海峡替代航线：——进入航线：自阿曼海向北航行至拉腊克岛，随后继续前往波斯湾。（据地图所示）——离开航线：自波斯湾出发，经拉腊克岛以南，继续驶向阿曼海。（据地图所示）

text: Rare footage from the Reuters archives shows the aftermath of the Israeli air force bombing of the Bahr al-Baqar primary school in Egypt, which resulted in the martyrdom of 46 children, April 8, 1970. Israeli Defense Minister Moshe Dayan commented on the massacre: "Perhaps the Egyptians put the schoolchildren in a military base."
text_zh: 路透社档案中的罕见画面显示了以色列空军轰炸埃及巴赫尔巴卡尔小学的后果，导致46名儿童殉难，1970年4月8日。以色列国防部长摩西·达扬对此屠杀评论道：“也许埃及人把学童放在了军事基地里。”

text: On this day in 1970, Israel bombed Bahr el-Baqar primary school in the Egyptian village of Bahr el-Baqar killing 46 children and injuring more than 50. The whole school was levelled by US made F-4 jets.
text_zh: 1970年的这一天，以色列轰炸了埃及巴赫尔巴卡尔村的巴赫尔巴卡尔小学，造成46名儿童死亡，50多人受伤。整所学校被美国制造的F-4战机夷为平地。

text: Trump wants taxpayers to pay 15 million for his 250 million dollar arc; 13 million in matching grants. All this while his 2026 budget makes much needed cuts to many programs for Americans.
text_zh: 特朗普想让纳税人为其2.5亿美元的建筑项目支付1500万美元；其中1300万美元需配套拨款。而与此同时，他2026年的预算案却大幅削减了多项美国民众急需的福利计划。

text: 🏁 “When Trump threatened to destroy the entire Iranian civilization, did that bother you as a diplomat?” Rutti Frutti: “You know… what I always say when it comes to what leaders say is that I don’t comment on everything. What I want you to know is that I support the president, and I know large parts of Europe do as well when it comes to limiting Iran’s capacity to spread chaos across the region, into Europe, and around the world. They are one of the main enablers of Russia’s war effort in Ukraine—we all know this—with the drones. It’s an existential threat to Israel if they were to get their hands on nuclear capability…” No wonder NATO is struggling—just look at who’s representing it. There has probably never been a bigger “soy” in NATO than Mark. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🏁 “当特朗普威胁要摧毁整个伊朗文明时，作为外交官，这让你困扰吗？” 鲁蒂·弗鲁蒂：“你知道……每当涉及领导人言论时，我总说我不对一切发表评论。我想让你知道的是，我支持总统，而且我知道，在限制伊朗向该地区、欧洲乃至全球扩散混乱能力的问题上，欧洲大部分国家也持相同立场。众所周知，他们是俄罗斯在乌克兰战争行动的主要支持者之一——通过无人机。如果他们获得核能力，对以色列将是生存威胁……” 难怪北约举步维艰——看看代表它的是谁。马克恐怕是北约史上最大的“软蛋”。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: A senior Vatican diplomat, Christophe Pierre, was reportedly summoned to the Pentagon and given a “bitter lecture” by Elbridge Colby, urging that Pope Leo “better take [the U.S.’s] side” and noting America can do “whatever it wants.” Source: The Free Press
text_zh: 据报道，梵蒂冈高级外交官克里斯托弗·皮埃尔被召至五角大楼，埃尔布里奇·科尔比对其进行了“严厉训诫”，敦促教皇利奥“最好站在[美国]一边”，并指出美国可以“为所欲为”。来源：自由新闻

text: New reporting reveals the Pentagon threatened Pope Leo XIV’s ambassador over the Pope's anti-war statements: "America has the military power to do whatever it wants in the world. The Catholic Church had better take its side.”
text_zh: 最新报道披露，五角大楼因教皇的反战言论威胁了教皇利奥十四世的大使：“美国拥有在世界上为所欲为的军事力量。天主教会最好站在我们这边。”

text: She was out to buy formula milk for her babies Rana Naji, from the town of Harouf, whose body was found under the rubble of the pharmacy that was targeted in Kaifoun
text_zh: 她出门为她的孩子拉娜·纳吉购买配方奶粉，她来自哈鲁夫镇，其遗体在凯富恩被袭击的药店废墟下被发现
